conflict_type: Conflicts between Keyword Constraints and Phrase Constraints
seed_instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo.
org_constraint: Ensure the email begins with the phrase "I hope this message finds you well."
new_constraint: Avoid using the word "message" in the opening sentence of the email.
instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo. Ensure the email begins with the phrase "I hope this message finds you well." Avoid using the word "message" in the opening sentence of the email.
response:
Subject: Request for Product Demo: [Product Name/Type]

Dear [Developer Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I have been following the development of [Product Name] and am very impressed with the features you have implemented so far. Our team is currently looking for a solution that can help us [mention a specific goal, e.g., streamline our workflow / improve data security], and your software seems like it could be a great fit.

Would you be available for a brief product demo sometime next week? I would love to see the platform in action and learn more about how it handles [specific feature or integration].

Please let me know your availability, or feel free to send over a booking link if that is easier.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Job Title]
[Your Company]<turn|>
